title: Elevate
description: Use OAL privileged execution only for bounded commands that need host privileges, such as Xcode or signing commands. Use when sandboxed shell execution blocks a required validation or deploy command.
body: Prefer normal guarded shell first. Use privileged execution only when the command is allowlisted, argv is explicit, cwd is inside the repo or approved target root, and dry-run evidence proves the request shape before execution. Never pass a shell string, pipeline, glob expansion, or user-provided command through privileged execution.
